Article Title: Veteran journalist S Thyagarajan dies
Article Text:
Image: X@/g_rajaraman

Chennai, Veteran Indian sports journalist S Thyagarajan, who carved a niche for himself with his extensive coverage of hockey, died here on Monday after battling age-related ailments.He was 85. He is survived by his wife and two daughters.His cremation took place in Chennai on Monday.Thyagarajan, who covered six Olympics and nine Asian Games, served 'The Hindu' newspaper from 1962 to 2013 before his retirement. He started his career with 'The Indian Express' in 1961."S. Thyagarajan, veteran sports correspondent and doyen of hockey writing, who worked with The Hindu for many decades, passed away," 'the Hindu's sports editor K C Vijaya Kumar posted on 'X'.Thyagarajan also served on the media and communications-related committees of the International Hockey Federation (FIH) and the Asian Hockey Federation (AHF) during his journalistic career.He was a former president of both the Sports Journalist Federation of India and the Tamil Nadu Sports Journalists Association.Former India captain-cum-coach and 1980 Olympic gold medallist Vasudevan Baskaran was heartbroken as Tyagarajan, commonly known as "Thyagu" covered his entire career and supported him throughout."When I started hockey in 1969 he was covering the sport and used to cover collegiate hockey for the Hindu. That's basically how he came into prominence. His dedication, love and knowledge of the sport was impeccable," Baskaran told PTI."It's a very sad for Indian sports as he was a great athletics correspondent as well besides hockey. His contribution to Indian hockey was immense," he added.Senior journalist and hockey historian K Arumugam was at loss of words for Thayagarajan's demise."I knew him for more than 30 years. He was rare, an all-rounder journalist. He was master of all aspects not just hockey. He was a story teller," Arumugam said."He was globally very well respected, his knowledge was very well recognised," he said.Senior Indian sports journalist S Sabanayakan, a former president of the Sports Journalist Federation of India (SJFI) who has worked with prominent newspapers like The Hindu and The Telegraph, termed Thyagarajan's death as an "irreparable loss" for the fraternity."The passing of S Thyagarajan is an irreparable loss to sports journalism. An expert in field hockey, Thyagu as he is well known, groomed a lot of youngsters in the profession. A fluent writer, his writing style was racy and unique," he said."He was the president of Sports Journalists' Federation of India for one term of two years in 1996. He also headed the Tamil Nadu Sports Journalists' Association for many years. He was also the Chairman of the Field Hockey Commission of AIPS from 1998 to 2006."He covered 6 Olympics, nine Asian Games, nine hockey World Cups and 20 hockey nationals in his illustrious career. In October 2024, he was felicitated by SJFI for his contribution to sports journalism," he addedThe Sports Journalists Federation of India condoled the demise of Thyagarajan.President Saraju Chakraborty said the passing away of the doyen of sports journalism was an irreparable loss to the fraternity.
Article Summary: Thyagarajan covered six olympics and nine asian games. He started his career with 'the indian express' in 1961. He was a former president of both the sports journalist federation of india and the tamil nadu sports journalists association. He is survived by his wife and two daughters.

Article Title: Magic Johnson sends heartwarming message for longtime NBA friend Michael Jordan following latest NASCAR accolade
Article Text:
Magic Johnson and Michael Jordan. Image via: Getty Images

Magic Johnson sends a congratulatory message to Michael Jordan



Tyler Reddick shines at Darlington Raceway



Tyler Reddick. Image via: NASCAR.com

A major NASCAR result over the weekend drew attention as Magic Johnson publicly celebrated his longtime friend Michael Jordan . The moment came after another strong showing from Jordan’s 23XI Racing team. While it was not the first time, Johnson’s heartfelt wish shows the friendship between the NBA legends.Jordan’s involvement in NASCAR has been remarkable. With consistent performances and increasing wins, 23XI Racing has become a serious contender early in the 2026 season. The latest success at Darlington only strengthened the hope, placing both Jordan and his team firmly in the spotlight.Magic Johnson took to social media to acknowledge the achievement, writing, "Another great accomplishment for my good friend Michael Jordan and his NASCAR Cup Series driver, Tyler Reddick, who won the Darlington Raceway yesterday!"Jordan who is a co-owner of 23XI Racing has been actively involved with the team.The involvement and investment of Jordan in the sport have aided in the building of the profile of the organization. This has been a very effective competitive structure that Jordan and his co-owner, Denny Hamlin, have developed, and the team is now competing with the long-established powerhouses.In the NASCAR scene, teams such as Hendrick Motorsports, Joe Gibbs Racing, and Team Penske have been at the top for years.However, recent performances are indicating that 23XI Racing is narrowing the gap.Tyler Reddick delivered one of the most impressive drives of the season at Darlington Raceway, overcoming multiple setbacks to secure victory in the Goodyear 400. Starting from pole position, Reddick led early before a pit issue dropped him down the order. He later fought back through the field, regaining control of the race.Of course, mechanical challenges were there. A failing alternator forced him to manage power carefully, even shutting off systems to keep the car running. Despite the heat and pressure, he stayed focused during the final laps."To win four [races] in the fashion we’ve won the four is pretty remarkable," Reddick said. "Three of the four wins we’ve had to fight through some level of adversity... Just really proud of my team."He added, "The final 100 laps were brutally hot, "Reddick said. "[Crew chief] Billy [Scott] asked me if I was willing to stay and keep everything off. I was all in because I really wanted to win here."Reddick’s latest win was his fourth in six races, giving him a commanding lead in the standings.
Article Summary: Tyler reddick won the goodyear 400 at darlington raceway on sunday. Jordan is a co-owner of 23xi racing, which reddick leads in the standings. Magic johnson took to social media to congratulate reddick and jordan.

Article Title: Afghan fans 'committed suicide' after Asia Cup loss to Pakistan: Gurbaz recalls defeat that shook country
Article Text:
Afghanistan's Fareed Ahmad, left, and Pakistan's Asif Ali, right, react after Ali was dismissed by Ahmad during the T20 cricket match of Asia Cup between Pakistan and Afghanistan, in Sharjah, United Arab Emirates. (File photo/Agencies)

Watch Afghanistan cricketer on air strike by Pakistan, constant support from India Afghanistan cricketer on air strike by Pakistan, constant support from India

Afghanistan opener Rahmanullah Gurbaz has spoken about the impact of his team’s loss to Pakistan in the Asia Cup 2022, saying the defeat led to extreme reactions among fans back home, including incidents of suicide.Afghanistan opener Rahmanullah Gurbaz said he still finds it difficult to accept how his team lost that match at the Sharjah Cricket Stadium.Pakistan needed 11 runs in the final over with one wicket left. Naseem Shah then hit Fazalhaq Farooqi for two sixes off the first two balls to take his side to victory.Gurbaz said the defeat had a strong impact back home. "For me, the most heartbreaking match was the loss against Pakistan in the 2022 Asia Cup.People back home were very hurt. Many people cried. Here, people committed suicide. We have many emotional people here. We also get hurt as we play for people here," Gurbaz told Shubhankar Mishra.He said the memories of that game still affect him. "As I am talking to you about that match, I can still recall the sad memories. Whenever I walk into the Sharjah Stadium, I am reminded of that heartbreaking loss. I still think about how we lost that game, which we should have won.We didn't bat well, but we bowled nicely. But in the end, we lost," he added.In that match, Afghanistan scored 129/6 in 20 overs. Pakistan were 110/8 at one stage before a late effort from Asif Ali and Naseem Shah helped them win.Gurbaz also spoke about the rivalry between the two teams. He said it carries importance for fans in Afghanistan, even though he does not have personal issues with players from Pakistan."We are cricketers. We play for people here in Afghanistan. Our happiness lies in our people's happiness. If you ask people here about the most memorable game, they would tell you about the 2023 ODI World Cup win against Pakistan," said Gurbaz."As a cricketer, I don't have any personal grudges against any other cricketer. Our fans here want us to defeat Pakistan at all times," he added.
Article Summary: Afghanistan opener rahmanullah gurbaz speaks about his team's asia cup 2022 loss. He says the defeat led to extreme reactions among fans back home, including incidents of suicide. He said he still finds it difficult to accept how his team lost that match.

Article Title: Sunil Gavaskar ‘not able to get Dhurandhar 2 tickets’, turns to actor for help
Article Text:
Sunil Gavaskar and Ranveer Singh (Agency Image)

With the Indian Premier League 2026 season just days away, an unexpected topic has captured the nation’s attention — Dhurandhar: The Revenge. Directed by Aditya Dhar and starring Ranveer Singh , the film has triggered a frenzy across the country, cutting through even the IPL buzz.The spy-action sequel, released last week, is enjoying a sensational run at the box office, raking in massive collections and shattering records. With demand for tickets skyrocketing, even one of India’s greatest cricketers, Sunil Gavaskar , has found it difficult to secure a seat in theatres.Veteran actor Rakesh Bedi , who plays a key role in the two-part film, revealed the amusing episode through a video on Instagram. While requesting fans to avoid sharing spoilers, Bedi recounted his recent meeting with Gavaskar and the unusual request that followed.“Talking about sports, yesterday I met one of the great sportspersons of India, the great Sunil Gavaskar ji. He said, ‘Rakesh ji, I am not able to get the tickets. So please arrange it for me,” said Bedi in the video.“So I am trying to arrange some tickets for him. I hope I am able to,” he added.The film is now on track to become the highest-grossing Bollywood movie of all time, a record currently held by its predecessor, Dhurandhar.The craze has extended into the cricketing world as well. Players from Gujarat Titans were recently seen visiting a theatre in Ahmedabad to watch the sequel, while Hardik Pandya , captain of Mumbai Indians, was also spotted at a multiplex enjoying the film.
Article Summary: The spy-action sequel, released last week, is enjoying a sensational run at the box office, raking in massive collections and shattering records. With demand for tickets skyrocketing, even one of india’s greatest cricketers, sunil gavaskar, has found it difficult to secure a seat in theatres.

Article Title: Lauren Betts family: Meet the parents and siblings of the UCLA star
Article Text:
Image via IMAGN

Lauren Betts’ parents: A family of athletes

Who are Lauren Betts’ siblings?

Lauren Betts is one of the best centers in college basketball, and it's not only because she's talented. She comes from a very athletic family. The 6-foot-7 star for the UCLA Bruins has become an important part of the program's recent success. Her rise to the top of the sport can be traced back to a family full of successful athletes.From professional basketball to championship-level volleyball, Betts’ family roots reveal a strong sporting lineage that has helped shape the UCLA standout.Betts was born to two accomplished college athletes Michelle Betts and Andy Betts.Her mother, Michelle Betts was a great volleyball player at Long Beach State Beach.She played as an outside hitter in college and helped her team win the NCAA national championship in 1993. Her success in collegiate sports made it easier for her to have a strong athletic environment at home.Meanwhile, Betts’ father, Andy Betts, had a great career in basketball. He was 7 feet 1 inch tall and played collegiate basketball at Long Beach State. The Charlotte Hornets picked him in the 1998 NBA Draft. He didn't have a long career in the NBA, but he played in other leagues for more than a decade, including in Spain, Italy, and Greece.Lauren Betts was actually born in Spain while her father was playing professionally in the country’s Liga ACB league. She later moved to the United States with her family when she was around eight years old.Lauren is the oldest among four siblings, and several of them are already making waves in basketball.Her younger sister Sienna Betts is one of the most highly regarded prospects in women’s basketball. The 6-foot-4 forward is ranked among the top recruits in the Class of 2025 and has committed to join her sister at UCLA. The possibility of the two playing together has generated excitement among Bruins fans.Another sibling, Dylan Betts, has also attracted attention early in his basketball journey. Listed at 7 feet 2 inches, Dylan is a high school player in the Class of 2028. Though still early in his career, his height and potential have already put him on the radar of college programs.Lauren also has a younger half-brother named Ashton, though little public information is available about him so far.With parents who competed at the highest collegiate levels and siblings already rising in basketball, the Betts family represents a rare multi-generation athletic story.Lauren Betts’ success at UCLA where she has been recognized among the top players in the Big Ten Conference is just the beginning of what could become a remarkable family legacy in basketball.And if her younger siblings continue on their current paths, the Betts name may remain a familiar one in college basketball for years to come.
Article Summary: Lauren betts is one of the best centers in college basketball. Her rise to the top of the sport can be traced back to a family full of successful athletes. Betts was born to two accomplished college athletes michelle betts and andy betts.

Article Title: Patrick Mahomes Brittany Mahomes: Brittany Mahomes wows fans with striking gym look as Patrick Mahomes stays focused on rehab ahead of new season
Article Text:
Brittany Mahomes wows fans with striking gym look as Patrick Mahomes stays focused on rehab ahead of new season (Getty Image)

Brittany Mahomes’ gym look gains attention while Patrick Mahomes' rehab remains the focus



Brittany Mahomes all-red gym outfit (Instagram)

Brittany Mahomes drew attention after posting a gym selfie that quickly gained traction across social media, but beyond the reactions, the moment also came as Patrick Mahomes continued a key phase of his recovery.The post stood out for its timing and simplicity, as the Kansas City Chiefs head into an important offseason with their franchise quarterback still working his way back from injury.Brittany Mahomes' outfit in the post featured a coordinated red workout set, including a fitted top captured in a mirror selfie from inside a gym setting, which kept the visual clean and direct while putting the focus on her fitness routine.Beyond the gym, Brittany has also been involved in the personal side of their lives, especially as she has remained visible during this phase of Patrick Mahomes' rehab, often sharing glimpses of her routine while supporting her husband.That support comes during a demanding stretch, as Patrick Mahomes continues to recover from a torn ACL suffered late in the 2025 NFL season, with the team closely monitoring his progress.On March 22, 2026, Chiefs head coach Andy Reid provided an update during a media interaction reported by Charles Goldman of Chiefs Wire, in which he outlined the quarterback’s current routine. “He’s around here all the time… seven hours a day. He’s in there making progress every day.”Reid also referenced the structured nature of the rehab process and the role of the team’s staff, including Julie Frymyer, in guiding Mahomes through recovery. “Julie Frymyer makes sure he stays on task and challenges him... It's not going to be a pleasant thing every day; you've got to fight through and attack the challenge of the rehab and workout.”The update aligns with typical early-stage ACL rehab, where consistency and controlled workload remain key, and Reid added that Mahomes is “doing great for just being three weeks out,” indicating steady early progress without suggesting any accelerated timeline.Aside from football, Brittany Mahomes has also alluded to her family life in an interview with SheKnows: “I just want to be with my kids, you know, 24/7…”Looking ahead, Chiefs Vice President of Sports Medicine Rick Burkholder said in a December 2025 press conference that ACL recovery timelines typically take around 9 months, though individual cases can vary. For now, while Brittany Mahomes' outfit continues to generate online interest, the key storyline remains the Patrick Mahomes injury update, with the Chiefs focused on a careful, steady return ahead of the 2026 season.
Article Summary: Brittany mahomes posted a mirror selfie of herself in a red gym outfit. The post came as the kansas city chiefs head into an important offseason with their franchise quarterback still working his way back from injury. Patrick mahomes continues to recover from a torn acl suffered late in the 2025 season.

Article Title: James Hagens: Elliotte Friedman hints at James Hagens’ signing decision coming soon as Boston Bruins face a big call
Article Text:
Elliotte Friedman reveals decision about Boston Bruins signing James Hagens (Image via: Getty Images)

Elliotte Friedman drops major hints on Boston Bruins’ next move for prospect James Hagens

Watch We Just Want Clarity | 32 Thoughts We Just Want Clarity | 32 Thoughts

As the Boston Bruins are facing an unexpected decision regarding signing one of the top prospect James Hagens, NHL Insider Elliotte Friedman has just dropped a hint at the possible decision about the young player's potential signing. The Insider has added a twist to the signing and said that the league will have a clear indication of the situation on Monday.As per reports, Hagens, who is the Bruins' seventh overall pick in the 2025 NHL Draft, has completed his college season with Boston College and is widely expected to turn professional soon. However, Friedman reported that Boston may hesitate to bring him into the NHL roster immediately due to concerns about disrupting team chemistry during the playoff race.Meanwhile, in the Atlantic Division, the Boston Bruins stands at the fourth place. Before the Bruins, prominent NHL clubs like the Buffalo Sabres, Tampa Bay Lightning, and Montreal Canadiens are leading the first three positions. The Boston Bruins continue to stand firmly in the Atlantic Division playoff race as the regular season enters its final stretch of the playoff race. NHL Insider Elliotte Friedman has recently dropped a major hint on the Boston Bruins’ next move for their prospect James Hagens.As the Boston College hockey team locked horns in the Hockey East semifinals against UConn on Friday night at the TD Garden, all eyes turned to the James Hagens watch for the Boston Bruins.With reports of good performance and playmaking skills, Hagens seems to be a promising player and has done very well in college hockey. However, it is only a matter of time before he becomes a professional player for two possible places. Reports suggest that he could either land on the main team in the NHL or join the Providence Bruins in the AHL.On his latest “32 Thoughts” podcast, Elliotte Friedman said he has no doubt about Hagens’ capabilities and talent, calling him a key part of their prospect pool, and the decision is expected to be out by Monday. "I think Monday will get a clear indication of where this is going to go,'' the expert said.He further added about Hagens being a promising player and would be a great fit for the team, " I don't have any doubt about his ability long-term. And I don't think that anybody doubts that James Hagens is anything but a great fit for them and a great player to have as part of their prospect pool and the future of the Bruins.”Friedman further stated that he is not sure if the Bruins will add him to the main hockey league or put him in the AHL, as he has seen many teams getting nervous in the middle of a playoff race to add a new player to their roster.The Insider believes that if GM Don Sweeney could bring Lukas Reichel in the middle of a playoff race, they could add Hagens too, and this will not hurt the team's good chemistry that the Boston Bruins are currently worried about. However, if the Bruins add Hagens to their main team, they are expected to bring him into the professional game soon, potentially as early as next season.
Article Summary: Nhl insider elliotte friedman drops major hints on boston bruins’ next move for prospect james hagens. Hagens, who is the bruins' seventh overall pick in the 2025 nhl draft, has completed his college season with boston college. Friedman reported that boston may hesitate to bring him into the nhl roster immediately due to concerns about disrupting team chemistry.

Article Title: Arsenal Tottenham Rivalry: Piers Morgan shares bold Tottenham relegation comment after Arsenal loss as Premier League FA Cup Champions League hopes continue
Article Text:
Piers Morgan shares bold Tottenham relegation comment after Arsenal loss as Premier League FA Cup Champions League hopes continue (Image via Getty)

Piers Morgan jokes about Tottenham relegation after Arsenal loss as Mikel Arteta’s side stay in title race

Piers Morgan made a bold and funny comment after Arsenal lost the Carabao Cup final to Manchester City. The well-known Arsenal supporter reacted right after the 2-0 defeat, which ended the team’s chance to win every trophy this season. While many fans felt disappointed, Morgan tried to lift the mood with humor. He said that even though the “quintuple dream” is now over, Arsenal can still aim for another kind of “quadruple.” His comments quickly caught attention, especially because he brought Tottenham Hotspur into the conversation in a surprising way.At the same time, Arsenal still remain in the race for big titles like the Premier League, FA Cup, and UEFA Champions League.So while the loss hurt, their season is far from finished.Piers Morgan shared that Arsenal fans inside Wembley Stadium found an unexpected reason to cheer during a tough night. He pointed to Tottenham Hotspur’s 3-0 loss to Nottingham Forest happening at the same time. According to Morgan, Arsenal fans reacted loudly when Forest scored.He said, “Every time Forest scored, there were loud cheers in the Bobby Moore Room [at Wembley].I don’t think I’ve ever seen Arsenal fans cheer opposition goals as loudly as we did. When they won 3-0, there was almost a standing ovation.”Then he added a line that quickly went viral. “My dream of the quintuple has sadly collapsed. Now, we can only settle for the quadruple: winning the Champions League, the Premier League, the FA Cup, and Tottenham getting relegated from the PL.”His comment was clearly meant as a joke, but it also showed the deep rivalry between Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur. Fans from both sides often tease each other, and this moment was no different.Even after the cup loss, Mikel Arteta’s team still have a strong season going. They are fighting for the Premier League title and are still alive in both the FA Cup and the UEFA Champions League. That means Arsenal still have a real chance to win major trophies this year.Morgan also asked fans to stay strong and support the team. He used a famous quote to make his point clear. He said, “Let’s unite, move forward, and win. Remember Churchill’s words: ‘Never give in, never, never, never, never… never give in except to convictions of honour and good sense. Never yield to force; never yield to the apparently overwhelming might of the enemy.’”His words expressed that the season is not over, and Arsenal still have a lot to fight for.
Article Summary: Piers morgan jokes about tottenham relegation after arsenal loss as mikel arteta’s side stay in title race. Morgan: “my dream of the quintuple has sadly collapsed. Now, we can only settle for the quadruple: winning the champions league, the premier league, and tottenham getting relegated from the pl”

Article Title: Daniel Robert: What happened to Daniel Robert as Phillies pitcher collapses during very scary bullpen moment in spring training
Article Text:
Daniel Robert (Image Via Getty)

Daniel Robert’s cardiac history, Phillies return, and what really happened during the bullpen collapse

Philadelphia Phillies pitcher Daniel Robert went through a frightening moment on Sunday during spring training in Clearwater, Florida. The 31-year-old reliever suddenly collapsed on the mound during his first bullpen session at BayCare Ballpark. He was quickly taken to the hospital, where doctors later confirmed he had suffered a cardiac event. The good news is that he is now in stable condition and has since been released.The incident shocked everyone present at the Phillies camp. Manager Rob Thomson, who was standing nearby, saw everything happen in real time. “I was standing right behind him,” Thomson said. “It was scary because he went down, he started to get back up again and he went back down.It was very scary, but he’s fine.” The moment spread concern across the team, especially given Robert’s recent health history.This was not the first time Daniel Robert faced such a situation. Back in October, he had a similar cardiac event during a bullpen session at the Carpenter Complex. After that, doctors placed an implantable cardioverter defibrillator near his chest. This device helps control heart rhythm, and reports suggest it activated again during Sunday’s incident.Even after several medical tests in Clearwater and at Emory University Hospital in Atlanta, doctors were not able to find a clear reason behind his condition. That made Sunday’s moment even more concerning for those who knew his story.Despite everything, Robert stayed positive and focused on his return. He rejoined the Phillies on a minor-league deal in February after becoming a free agent in November. Last season, he had a 4.15 ERA in 15 games, showing he could still contribute on the mound.What stands out more is his connection with the team. After returning, Robert openly spoke about how much the Phillies supported him during his recovery. “I feel like I have a real bond with the Phillies,” he said. “I’m super grateful to them, legitimately the entire staff. I owe everything to them.”His wife Jillian also played a big role during this time. As an ICU nurse, she helped him understand everything happening around his health. “She’s an ICU nurse so she’s kind of been my translator with all the doctors,” Robert shared. “She was so good keeping family and friends informed. She thought it was honestly a miracle that I was perfectly fine 20 minutes later.”For now, the biggest relief is that Daniel Robert is safe. The Phillies and their fans will now wait for further updates on his recovery and whether he can return to baseball again.
Article Summary: Philadelphia phillies pitcher daniel robert collapsed on the mound during a bullpen session. He was taken to the hospital, where doctors confirmed he had suffered a cardiac event. He is now in stable condition and has since been released. This was not the first time robert faced such a situation.

Article Title: Lebron James: LeBron James could be setting up his final act away from Lakers, insiders hint
Article Text:
NBA Star LeBron James (Image via Getty)

LeBron James expected to leave Lakers as Cavaliers, Warriors emerge as frontrunners



The NBA world was set on fire this morning following a report an insider revealed that there is a growing consensus among league executives that LeBron James will not return to the Los Angeles Lakers for the 2026-27 season.While LeBron has spent the last several seasons in Purple and Gold, the report suggests that the "King’s" reign in Hollywood is nearing its end. Here is a simple breakdown of why this is happening and where he might go next.Despite the Lakers being a top seed in the Western Conference this year, the vibes behind the scenes are reportedly "dicey." Several factors are pushing LeBron toward the exit, Under head coach JJ Redick, LeBron has transitioned into a "third-option" role.With Luka Doncic now leading the Lakers' offense, LeBron is playing fewer minutes and taking fewer shots. While this has helped the team win, many believe LeBron wants to be "The Man" one last time before retiring.Reports of tension between LeBron’s camp and Lakers owner Jeanie Buss have persisted for months. There is a sense that both sides may be ready for a fresh start.LeBron has a player option this summer. By opting out, he becomes a completely free agent, giving him total control over his final chapter.According to the insider, two teams have emerged as the frontrunners to sign the 4-time MVP:1. The Cleveland Cavaliers This is the "Homecoming" narrative. LeBron began his career in Cleveland and brought them a championship in 2016. Joining a roster that already features stars like Donovan Mitchell and James Harden would allow LeBron to compete for a title while finishing his career where it all started.2. The Golden State Warriors This is the "Dream Scenario" for many fans. The idea of LeBron James and Stephen Curry finally playing on the same team has been the talk of the league for years. The Warriors are reportedly desperate for one more championship run and see LeBron as the missing piece to pair with Curry.Nothing is official until the free agency period begins this summer. LeBron remains focused on the Lakers' current playoff push, but the noise surrounding his departure is louder than ever. If the Lakers fail to win the title this year, expect the Cleveland and Golden State rumors to reach a fever pitch.
Article Summary: Lebron james expected to leave lakers as cavaliers, warriors emerge as frontrunners. Lebron has a player option this summer. By opting out, he becomes a completely free agent, giving him total control. If the lakers fail to win the title this year, expect the cleveland and golden state rumors to reach a fever pitch.

Article Title: Ayan Broomfield: Frances Tiafoe girlfriend Ayan Broomfield speaks out after Arthur Cazaux match as Miami Open crowd moment stands out
Article Text:
Ayan Broomfield (Image Via Getty)

Frances Tiafoe defeats Arthur Cazaux as Ayan Broomfield reacts to crowd and looks ahead to Jakub Mensik clash

Frances Tiafoe got the win, but it was something in the crowd that grabbed attention after his match. During his second-round game at the 2026 Miami Open on March 21, some fans were heard cheering for his opponent, Arthur Cazaux. That moment did not sit well with Tiafoe’s girlfriend, Ayan Broomfield, who was watching from the stands.Soon after the match, Ayan shared her reaction on Instagram. Instead of a long message, she chose a playful but clear video to show how she felt. Even though Tiafoe won in straight sets, the crowd’s mixed support became a talking point, especially after her post started getting attention online.Frances Tiafoe faced Arthur Cazaux at the Butch Buchholz court inside Hard Rock Stadium.The American handled the match well and won 7-6(1), 6-1. He stayed calm in the first set tiebreak and then took full control in the second set. On paper, it looked like a smooth win, but the atmosphere inside the stadium told a slightly different story.While many fans supported Tiafoe, a few were clearly backing Cazaux and even wanted the match to go longer. That is what caught Ayan Broomfield’s attention.On her Instagram, she posted a reel with a caption that read, “When I’m at my boyfriend’s tennis match and people start cheering for the other guy.”In the video, she lip-synced to a viral audio from Kendall Toole, saying, “Get ’em banned. We don’t do that here. Oh, now I’m pissed.”Her reaction was clearly playful, but fans quickly picked up on it. Many agreed with her, while others felt it was just part of sports where crowds sometimes support both players.Ayan Broomfield is not new to tennis. She played college tennis and understands the game well. She has been with Tiafoe since 2015, and the two have often supported each other’s careers. She is regularly seen at his matches, cheering from the stands.Now, the focus shifts back to the court. Frances Tiafoe will next face defending Miami Open champion Jakub Mensik in the third round. This will be a tough match. Mensik already has a win over Tiafoe from the 2025 Davis Cup Qualifiers. He also won the Miami Open last year, beating Novak Djokovic in the final.If Tiafoe wants to move forward, he will need to play at a very high level. His aggressive style will be tested against Mensik’s strong serve and backhand. If he wins, he could face Felix Auger-Aliassime or Terence Atmane in the next round.
Article Summary: Frances tiafoe beat arthur cazaux 7-6(1), 6-1 at the 2026 miami open. His girlfriend, ayan broomfield, was watching from the stands. She posted a video on instagram about the mixed support from the crowd. Many agreed with her, while others felt it was just part of sports.

Article Title: Patrick Mahomes: Patrick Mahomes’ Kansas City Chiefs tied to $146 million Miami Dolphins wide receiver
Article Text:
Patrick Mahomes’ Kansas City Chiefs tied to $146 million Miami Dolphins wide receiver (Image via Getty: Kansas City Chiefs logo and Miami Dolphins logo)

NFL Trade Rumors : Chiefs, Rams, Bills, 49ers linked to Dolphins WR Tyreek Hill

Miami WR Tyreek Hill could reunite with Patrick Mahomes and Travis Kelce in Kansas City

The Miami Dolphins released Tyreek Hill just days before the new league year. This news made Kansas City Chiefs defensive tackle Chris Jones write on X: “[Tyreek Hill] it’s [clock emoji].” Translation: it’s time you come home.In 2016, Clark Hunt’s Chiefs drafted two players: Jones and Hill. But in 2022, Jones stayed while Hill was traded to the Dolphins. In 2025, Hill suffered a brutal knee injury on the gridiron. At the end of the season and just days before the new league year? He was released by Miami.Hill underwent surgery. He is recovering. His recovery timeline places him just about Week 1 of the 2026 season.Who believes in him? His parent franchise’s player, Chris Jones. And a few other analysts who are still linking him to Kansas City.According to Polymarket’s predictions and odds for the 32-year-old wide receiver, four teams are ranked the highest to land him in 2026. 35 percent for Matthew Stafford’s Los Angeles Rams, who are actively looking for a reliable third option other than Davante Adams and Puka Nacua.Even though there could be a competition for Los Angeles WR3 place with New England Patriots wideout Stefon Diggs. Anyhow, the next team: 31 percent for Josh Allen ’s Buffalo Bills, who recently acquired DJ Moore from the Chicago Bears, but they may be looking for a veteran wideout.Then, 28 percent for Brock Purdy’s San Francisco 49ers, who may not have their star receiver, Brandon Aiyuk, for 2026. And lastly, 22 percent for Patrick Mahomes ’ Kansas City Chiefs as of this publication.There are four teams looking for veteran WRs, but only one is truly connected to Hill: the Chiefs.Heavy Sports’ Max Dible reports the 8-time Pro Bowler could reunite with Travis Kelce and Patrick Mahomes. He is not the WR1 Kansas City is missing, but he can play a meaningful role once he returns to the gridiron healthy by Week 1. He has recorded 11,363 receiving yards, 83 touchdowns on 819 receptions in 10 years.The Chiefs brought back tight end Travis Kelce on a one-year deal, who can be a sure-handed target for Mahomes in short and intermediate areas of the gridiron.If Hill regains his explosiveness after recovery, then he could bring the original trio back together, and all three can have a chance at the Super Bowl once again. The trio won the Lombardi Trophy in 2020 [Super Bowl LIV] by defeating the Niners. They could do it again. Something the Chiefs have been yearning for straight two years now.According to Spotrac’s calculated market value, the West Alabama alum is projected to sign a two-year, $30 million contract, which gives him an average annual income of $15.1 million. His total career earnings over 10 years are $146 million.Would the Chiefs reunite with their drafted player? Remains to be seen…
Article Summary: Miami wr tyreek hill could reunite with patrick mahomes and travis kelce in kansas city. According to spotrac’s calculated market value, the west alabama alum is projected to sign a two-year, $30 million contract, which gives him an average annual income of $15.1 million.

Article Title: Theophile Nael: Madrid Rookie Test toppers Theophile Nael and Nikita Bedrin reflect on the test: “It’s not an easy track to drive”
Article Text:
Madrid Rookie Test toppers Theophile Nael and Nikita Bedrin. (Image credit: Instagram)

Theophile Nael and Nikita Bedrin share their experiences from Madrid Rookie Test



Women drivers at Madrid Rookie Test



It was a remarkable day for Theophile Nael at the Madrid Rookie Test on Sunday, as the 18-year-old French driver topped the timesheets on his Formula E debut with Mahindra Racing. The rookie test was held at the historic Circuito del Jarama for the first time, just a day after the maiden Madrid E-Prix, which saw Antonio Felix da Costa take victory. Here is what the top performers said after the test, which saw 20 elite rookie drivers get behind the wheel of the GEN3 Evo Formula E car.Theophile Nael drove the No. 48 Mahindra Racing car and recorded the fastest time in the morning session. Nikita Bedrin, who topped the afternoon session for DS Penske, was unable to beat Nael’s benchmark of 1:29.216. Both drivers finished third in the alternate session, with Mahindra Racing’s official reserve driver Kush Maini securing second place in both sessions.Speaking after the test, Nael said, “It was a great day. We completed all of our run plans and found some intriguing things for the race team. I’m happy with the way we evolved throughout the day, and the things we discovered will really help the team going forward. That’s the main job for us, and we did that. I’m happy with that and I really enjoyed the day.”Nikita Bedrin finished third in the morning before topping the afternoon session with a fastest time of 1:29.250.Sharing his experience, the 20-year-old Russian driver said, “It was a really positive day here in Madrid. I ended the second session in P1 and P2 overall. We also completed a lot of test items for the team, and we’re really happy with what we achieved. I had strong lap times in both energy-saving and push laps. It’s not an easy track to drive, so I think we adapted well.”Bedrin also shared several pictures from the track on Instagram, writing, “Ending the day as the fastest here in Madrid at the @fiaformulae rookie test! Positive development work completed today. The track is really challenging and bumpy, but it made for a highly productive and genuinely fun session. Enjoyed every second of it – thanks to @ds_penske_fe for the opportunity.”The rookies were given six hours of track time in the GEN3 Evo Formula E car. Four drivers who had previously taken part in Formula E’s Women’s Test also participated in the race. They included Nissan’s Abbi Pulling, Envision Racing’s Ella Lloyd, Jaguar’s Juju Noda, and Cupra Kiro’s Bianca Bustamante.The ABB FIA Formula E World Championship will return with Rounds 7 and 8 in Berlin, in a double-header from 1–3 May at the Tempelhof Airport circuit.Also read: Madrid Rookie Test: Mahindra Racing’s Theophile Nael and Kush Maini, DS Penske’s Nikita Bedrin sweep top three in both sessions
Article Summary: Madrid rookie test toppers theophile nael and nikita bedrin. Nael topped the timesheets on his formula e debut with mahindra racing. The rookie test was held at the historic circuito del jarama for the first time. Four drivers who had previously taken part in formula e's women's test also participated.

Article Title: Mitch Evans: Mitch Evans says he should have won the race, in place of Jaguar teammate Antonio Felix da Costa: “Team got the result they wanted”
Article Text:
Mitch Evans finished second at Madrid E-Prix. (Image credit: Instagram)

Mitch Evans speaks about finishing second at the Madrid E-Prix

Mitch Evans congratulates Antonio Felix da Costa on his win



Mitch Evans has admitted he had the pace to win the Madrid E-Prix, but Jaguar TCS Racing ultimately backed teammate Antonio Felix da Costa for the victory. Evans eventually finished second, securing his third podium of the season. The No. 9 Jaguar TCS Racing driver has now opened up on the result and also congratulated da Costa on his second consecutive win of Season 12. The Portuguese driver joined the team this season.Reflecting on the race and his missed opportunity, Mitch Evans said, “I should have won the race, but I don’t want to take anything away from António [Félix da Costa], he drove a mega race. A one-two for the team, and the team got the result they wanted.I was playing the long game and had a good energy advantage, which brought me into the fight during the pit window, especially towards the end.”“I was surprised to be in the mix, but with my energy advantage it was always going to be a strong finish. It still was, just not the result I was hoping for. It is what it is, but it’s a great one-two for the team,” he added.Mitch Evans shared several celebratory pictures from the Madrid E-Prix, including one with his silver trophy and another alongside Antonio Felix da Costa as the teammates posed with their trophies.He captioned the post: “P2 in Madrid. Jag 1-2. Congrats to my brother for the win @afelixdacosta.”Da Costa responded with fire emojis, while Jaguar TCS Racing commented “Vamos”, along with a relieved emoji.Reacting to Evans’ post, a fan expressed their nervousness while watching the race, saying, “Great work today, very close to gold but amazing to watch (very scary on the final lap, I was sat on my sofa like this).” Another commented, “You can be proud of your progress during the race! First step next time.”A third fan added, “Congratulations Mitch! P16 to P2 is absolutely incredible. You deserved better, but you showed what an amazing driver, team-mate and person you are.”Evans currently sits third in the 2026 Formula E Drivers’ Championship with 65 points. He has one win at the Miami E-Prix and two additional podiums, including Jeddah and Madrid. Da Costa is just one point behind after securing back-to-back wins in Jeddah and Madrid.Also read: Antonio Felix da Costa calls Madrid E-Prix win “a dream day”, watch him celebrate in front of his family
Article Summary: Mitch evans finished second at the madrid e-prix on sunday. The no. 9 jaguar tcs racing driver has opened up on the result. He also congratulated teammate antonio felix da costa on his win. Evans currently sits third in the 2026 formula e drivers’ championship.

Article Title: NHL contract update: St. Louis Blues sign free agent forward Felix Trudeau to a two-year, entry-level contract
Article Text:
St. Louis Blues sign Sacred Heart University’s collegiate free agent forward Felix Trudeau to a two-year entry-level contract (Image via X/NHL.com)

St. Louis Blues sign Sacred Heart University’s Felix Trudeau to a two-year entry-level contract

The St. Louis Blues signed college free agent forward Felix Trudeau to a two-year entry-level contract on Monday. This was announced by the team officials, stating that the deal will begin in the 2026-27 NHL season, while Trudeau will finish the current season on a professional tryout with the AHL's Springfield Thunderbirds.He is considered a valuable addition to the team, as the 23-year-old was named one of 10 candidates for the Hobey Baker Award as the top player in NCAA Division I men’s hockey. Earlier, the St. Louis Blues beat the NHL-worst Vancouver Canucks by 3-1 on Saturday to end a two-game losing streak.As per reports, the club is just six points behind the Nashville Predators for the final wild-card playoff berth in the Western Conference.It is important to note that the club has won 7 games, lost 1 game in regulation, and lost 2 games in overtime/shootout in the most recent 10 games.The St. Louis Blues have signed collegiate free agent forward Felix Trudeau to a two-year entry-level contract beginning with the 2026-27 season. This was officially announced by Blues President of Hockey Operations and General Manager Doug Armstrong . Trudeau will be seen joining the Blues’ AHL affiliate, the Springfield Thunderbirds, on a professional tryout for the remainder of this season.As for Trudeau’s background, he was playing for Sacred Heart University in the Atlantic Hockey America conference, where the 23-year-old young hockey player ranked second nationally in goals (25) and sixth in points (48) across 39 games this season.He led the NCAA with 15 power-play goals, posted a +14 rating, and racked up 87 penalty minutes, showcasing his physical and scoring prowess. According to reports, in over four collegiate seasons, two at the University of Maine and two at Sacred Heart, Trudeau gained 99 points (46 goals, 53 assists) in 130 games.According to the NHL, Trudeau tallied 38 points (15 goals, 23 assists) and 64 penalty minutes during his first year at Sacred Heart, earning AHA Second All‑Conference Team honors. Besides, Trudeau was a Hober Baker Award finalist, highlighting his status as one of the top undrafted NCAA Talents.With this entry-level deal, Trudeau has to prove his worth in the AHL, as he is expected to begin his professional development in the league before pushing for an NHL roster spot with the Blues in the coming seasons.
Article Summary: St. louis blues sign sacred heart university’s felix trudeau to a two-year entry-level contract. The deal will begin in the 2026-27 nhl season, while trudeau will finish the current season on a professional tryout with the ahl's springfield thunderbirds.

Article Title: Danielle Collins: American tennis star Danielle Collins claims Corentin Moutet slid into DMs to flirt as French player fires back strongly
Article Text:
American tennis star Danielle Collins claims Corentin Moutet slid into DMs to flirt as French player fires back strongly (Image via Getty)

Corentin Moutet denies Danielle Collins’ DM and flirting claims as Miami Open controversy grows

Corentin Moutet has strongly denied Danielle Collins’ claims about him flirting with her and messaging her, turning a light TV moment into a real tennis controversy. The French player reacted after Collins spoke on Tennis Channel during the Miami Open, where she shared her side of a personal exchange between them. Collins, who has won four WTA singles titles and is currently dealing with a back injury, said Moutet tried to flirt with her before a match and later reached out again on social media. But within hours, Moutet responded publicly and called her story “BS,” making it clear he did not agree with anything she said.The situation quickly caught attention because both players are active on tour and the comments came during one of the biggest events of the month, the Miami Open.While Collins spoke in a casual, joking tone on TV, Moutet’s reply was direct and serious, which shifted the mood of the story.Danielle Collins explained on Tennis Channel that Corentin Moutet had been “hitting on her,” but she turned him down. She said she even joked that he needed a better serve if he wanted to flirt with her. Collins also brought up a past moment, saying Moutet got upset over her “no short kings zone” dating profile comment that had gone viral earlier.She added, “He was upset about that, messaged me, and then unfollowed me. Now he slid back in the DMs last night asking me if I saw his match and all the big serves that he was hitting. I don’t think he has a chance … yet.”But Corentin Moutet quickly pushed back on social media platform X. He wrote, “How can I unfollow you when I never followed you. @TennisChannel how can you let someone say BS like this on tv.”He did not stop there. Moutet also claimed that Collins was the one who followed him and even asked him about playing mixed doubles. He wrote, “You ready to say anything so people talks about you. You should learn how to love yourself so you won’t have to do stupid things for people loves.” He also added a sharp line toward the broadcaster, writing, “@TennisChannel good sport journalist.”As of now, Danielle Collins has not replied to Moutet’s statements. The story is still one-sided after his response, and fans are waiting to see if she speaks again.Meanwhile, on the court, Corentin Moutet kept his focus. He won his Miami Open match against Tomas Machac and is now set to face World No. 1 Jannik Sinner in the next round. The timing of this exchange has only added more attention to his upcoming match.
Article Summary: Corentin moutet has strongly denied danielle collins’ claims about him flirting with her and messaging her. The french player reacted after collins spoke on tennis channel during the miami open, where she shared her side of a personal exchange between them.

Article Title: Aminematue: Who is AmineMaTue? French streamer Mohamed Amine Mahmoud joins Sidemen Charity Match 2026 at Wembley Stadium
Article Text:
AmineMaTue (Image Via Getty)

Mohamed Amine Mahmoud known as AmineMaTue joins Sidemen Charity Match 2026 as one of Twitch’s biggest football creators





AmineMaTue is suddenly a name many football fans are searching for. The French streamer, whose real name is Mohamed Amine Mahmoud, is set to play in the Sidemen Charity Match 2026. The event will take place on April 18 at Wembley Stadium in London. It is one of the biggest creator football matches in the world, and this year, Amine is joining for the first time.For those who do not follow Twitch closely, AmineMaTue is already a huge name online. He has built a strong fan base through his live streams and football-related content. Now, with his entry into the Sidemen Charity Match, even more people are getting curious about who he is and why he is so popular.Mohamed Amine Mahmoud, better known as AmineMaTue, started gaining attention back in 2012 on Twitter. At that time, he was posting funny and sharp takes on football, politics, and pop culture. Over time, he slowly moved into live streaming, and around 2020, he began focusing fully on Twitch.His growth has reached an enormous size since that time. His current Twitch follower count stands at approximately 3.4 million.More than 27000 viewers watch his streams in real time according to his streaming statistics. His most significant achievement occurred on November 18 2022 when he organised the "Eleven All-Star" football match between France and Spain. That stream brought in nearly 1.2 million viewers at its peak.Amine is known for GTA roleplay streams, relaxed “Just Chatting” sessions, and large football events. His content feels close to real life, and that is one reason people connect with him easily.Now, he is stepping into the Sidemen Charity Match 2026, where Sidemen FC will face YouTube All-Stars. The match is not just for entertainment. It is played to raise money for charity and usually draws millions of viewers worldwide. This year, big creators like Jasontheween, Fanum, and Stable Ronaldo are also part of the lineup. Spanish streamer Ibai is another major name confirmed for the event.AmineMaTue will play for Sidemen FC. His selection was revealed during the official draft on March 22, 2026. During the stream, Sidemen member Josh made a light-hearted comment while picking him. He said, “You guys have gone with a Spanish audience. Our team’s looking pretty, um, Brexit. We’re going to go uh for another language… So, uh, bonjour, je m’appelle Josh… today, uh, me pick, Amine.”While many fans are excited about the lineup, some viewers have shared mixed reactions online. A few even called this year’s squad the “worst ever,” though interest around the event remains very high.With AmineMaTue now part of the match, his presence is expected to bring in a large French-speaking audience and add a different energy to the game.
Article Summary: Aminematue, real name mohamed amine mahmoud, will play in the sidemen charity match 2026. The event will take place on april 18 at wembley stadium in london. It is one of the biggest creator football matches in the world, and this year, amine is joining for the first time.

Article Title: Carlos Alcaraz: Eiza Gonzalez reaction goes viral after Sebastian Korda shocks Carlos Alcaraz at Miami Open in career defining win
Article Text:
Sebastian Korda and Carlos Alcaraz (Image Via Getty)

Sebastian Korda’s big win over Carlos Alcaraz draws praise from Eiza Gonzalez as he credits coach Ryan Harrison

Sebastian Korda pulled off one of the biggest surprises of the 2026 Miami Open on Sunday. The American player defeated World No. 1 Carlos Alcaraz in the Round of 32 at Hard Rock Stadium. It was a strong and confident performance from Korda, who stayed calm even when the match got tight. This win now stands as the biggest moment of his career so far.Carlos Alcaraz did not look at his best during the match. He lost the first set and struggled early in the second as his serve got broken. He did fight back to take the second set, but in the final moments, he could not match Korda’s steady game. After the last point, when Alcaraz hit his return long, Korda closed his eyes and smiled, clearly enjoying the moment.After the match, Sebastian Korda shared his happiness on Instagram. He posted a photo from his celebration and wrote, “Believe. Thanks for the love Miami.” Many people reacted to his post, but one message stood out. Actress Eiza Gonzalez, who is in a relationship with Grigor Dimitrov, commented, “Congratulations, we are so happy for you.” Her message quickly caught attention among fans.This result is also important for another reason. With this win, Korda became only the sixth American player since 2015 to defeat a World No.1. That shows how rare and special this moment is for him.Behind this performance, there was also a clear plan. Before the match, Korda had a long talk with his new coach, former American player Ryan Harrison. Instead of trying to play risky shots, the idea was simple: stay steady and not overdo things.Speaking after the match to ATP Tour, Korda explained his mindset. He said, “I took the scenic route, that’s for sure. There was a little more stress than I would want, but I’m happy with how I played, happy with how I stayed with it. I kept believing.”He also shared how his thinking has changed. “It was a lot of soul searching. I’ve gone through a lot of things. I’ve played a lot of great players, but haven’t always been able to get it done. I felt that when I was playing these top players, I was just spraying the ball and trying to do too much. I sat down with Ryan, and our goal today was to play average, to not try and do too much with it.” Next, Korda will face Spain’s Martin Landaluce in the Round of 16. After such a big win, all eyes will now be on how far he can go in Miami.
Article Summary: Sebastian korda defeated world no. 1 carlos alcaraz in the round of 32 at the 2026 miami open. The win is the biggest of his career so far, and he credits coach ryan harrison. Actress eiza gonzalez congratulated him on instagram.
